meta.description: Interpretations of planets in the houses of the solar-return chart. Show which area of life carries the main accent of the year.
meta.note: A solar-return house is not a personality trait — it is the year's theme: the life area where this planet directs its energy over the next 12 months.

sun.1: Solar-return Sun in the 1st house: a year of vivid self-expression and personal momentum. You're at the center of events, visible and energized; life revolves around your initiatives. A great year to start fresh and assert yourself. Strength: confidence, vitality, a bold new beginning; the risk, self-absorption and expecting everything to orbit around you.
sun.2: Solar-return Sun in the 2nd house: a year when the main focus falls on money, resources, and your sense of self-worth. Finances, possessions, and the question 'what am I worth' move to the foreground. A good year to build income and strengthen your material base. Strength: practicality, financial growth, confidence in your own abilities; the risk, extravagance and putting too much weight on the material.
sun.3: Solar-return Sun in the 3rd house: a year of communication, study, contacts, and movement. You talk, write, meet people, and learn a great deal; your immediate environment and short trips take center stage. Strength: a lively mind, useful connections, quick development; the risk, superficiality and busyness without depth.
sun.4: Solar-return Sun in the 4th house: a year of home, family, and inner life. The accent falls on housing, relatives, roots, and what forms your personal foundation. A good year to tend the home front and rebuild family bonds. Strength: warmth, strengthening your foundations, inner peace; the risk, retreating into the private and a dip in outer activity.
sun.5: Solar-return Sun in the 5th house: a year of creativity, love, pleasure, and play. Life blooms through joy — romance, hobbies, children, self-expression — all take priority. Strength: inspiration, charm, vivid experiences; the risk, frivolity and dodging responsibilities.
sun.6: Solar-return Sun in the 6th house: a year of work, health, and everyday tasks. Labor, discipline, caring for the body, and building good routines come to the foreground. A good year to get your affairs and health in order. Strength: productivity, discipline, real results; the risk, overwork and getting lost in routine.
sun.7: Solar-return Sun in the 7th house: a year of relationships and partnership. Unions, marriage, business ties, and key people take center stage; you come into your own through others. A good year for meaningful encounters and collaboration. Strength: diplomacy, unity, a partner's support; the risk, dependence on others' approval.
sun.8: Solar-return Sun in the 8th house: a year of transformation, depth, and others' resources. Major change, shared finances, inheritance, or work with what is hidden are possible. The year calls for radical honesty with yourself. Strength: depth, rebirth, growth through crisis; the risk, obsessiveness, control, and heavy situations.
sun.9: Solar-return Sun in the 9th house: a year of expanding horizons — study, travel, philosophy, and foreign connections. You seek meaning and push past familiar limits. A good year for education and long-range plans. Strength: growth, optimism, a new worldview; the risk, detachment from reality and unfinished business.
sun.10: Solar-return Sun in the 10th house: a year of career, status, and public recognition. Professional goals, reputation, and your role in the world move to the foreground; you're noticed. Strength: ambition, advancement, authority; the risk, working at the expense of private life and craving approval.
sun.11: Solar-return Sun in the 11th house: a year of friendship, teamwork, and goals for the future. Community, like-minded people, and group projects supply the energy; you think beyond the personal. Strength: support, a network of contacts, inspiring goals; the risk, dissolving into the group and losing your own direction.
sun.12: Solar-return Sun in the 12th house: a year of solitude, inner work, and taking stock. Much happens behind the scenes; you're drawn to quiet, the spiritual, and creative work in private. A year 'before a new cycle' — important to release the old. Strength: depth, spiritual growth, rest; the risk, isolation, escapism, and fatigue.

moon.1: Solar-return Moon in the 1st house: an emotionally rich year when feelings and mood set the tone for everything. You're especially sensitive, open, and reactive; intuition is heightened. Others read your inner state easily. Strength: responsiveness, warm charisma, attunement to yourself; the risk, mood swings and dependence on the emotional climate.
moon.2: Solar-return Moon in the 2nd house: a year of shifting finances and an unstable sense of self-worth. Income may fluctuate; there's an emotional attachment to money and possessions. Intuition around finances runs well. Strength: sensitivity to your own needs, a careful touch; the risk, impulse spending and unsteady income.
moon.3: Solar-return Moon in the 3rd house: a year of heartfelt conversation, emotionally colored talks, and active connection with your immediate circle. Correspondence, meetings, and short trips are all tinged with feeling. Strength: warm, attuned communication and good memory; the risk, subjective perception and anxious thinking.
moon.4: Solar-return Moon in the 4th house: a year with a strong accent on home, family, and emotional grounding. Domestic comfort, close relationships, and a sense of roots matter most. A good year to tend family life. Strength: warmth, care, a feeling of safety; the risk, withdrawal and excessive dependence on the home atmosphere.
moon.5: Solar-return Moon in the 5th house: a year of warm romantic feeling, play, and connection with children. Creativity flows through emotion; joy and spontaneity feed the soul. Strength: tenderness, inspiration, a living sense of delight; the risk, emotional swings in romance and giving in to every whim.
moon.6: Solar-return Moon in the 6th house: a year when health and daily work are colored by emotion. Physical wellbeing is quick to respond to stress; building a nurturing routine matters. Strength: attunement to your body's and work's needs; the risk, psychosomatic complaints and anxiety over small things.
moon.7: Solar-return Moon in the 7th house: a year when relationships become the main emotional center. Closeness, mutual care, and support in the pair matter most; there's a pull toward merging. Strength: warm, trusting bonds; the risk, emotional dependence on a partner.
moon.8: Solar-return Moon in the 8th house: a year of deep, intense feeling and hidden processes. Emotions are powerful; what's usually buried surfaces; experiences of loss or transformation are possible. Strength: emotional depth and regeneration; the risk, obsessive states and jealousy.
moon.9: Solar-return Moon in the 9th house: a year when the soul is fed by travel, study, philosophy, and new horizons. You're drawn to other cultures, knowledge, and meaning. Intuition is especially strong. Strength: openness to the world and spiritual growth; the risk, idealizing the distant and escaping ordinary life.
moon.10: Solar-return Moon in the 10th house: a year when career and reputation carry emotional weight. Public roles and recognition feed self-esteem; work in care or with people is possible. Strength: attunement to the public, intuition in professional matters; the risk, self-worth riding on others' opinions.
moon.11: Solar-return Moon in the 11th house: a year of emotional connection with friends, community, and shared goals. Support from your close circle matters most; group projects feed the soul. Strength: warmth in friendship and team synergy; the risk, emotional dependence on the group.
moon.12: Solar-return Moon in the 12th house: a year of solitude, dreamlife, and a rich inner emotional world. Feelings are often hidden or unconscious; you're drawn to quiet, the spiritual, and creative privacy. Strength: intuition, compassion, emotional depth; the risk, isolation and suppressed feelings.

mercury.1: Solar-return Mercury in the 1st house: a year when you think, talk, and move fast. Communication and ideas are your main tool; you're active, curious, and quick off the mark. A good year for learning and building contacts. Strength: liveliness, quick thinking, useful connections; the risk, busyness, nervous tension, and superficiality.
mercury.2: Solar-return Mercury in the 2nd house: a year when money and resources come through intellect, words, and communication. Financial matters call for analysis and negotiation; good for trade and mental work. Strength: a practical mind in business affairs; the risk, unsteady income and penny-pinching.
mercury.3: Solar-return Mercury in the 3rd house: a year of peak mental activity — study, correspondence, negotiation, travel, and new acquaintances. The mind runs at full speed. Strength: sharp thinking, useful contacts, and quick learning; the risk, information overload and nervous busyness.
mercury.4: Solar-return Mercury in the 4th house: a year when many thoughts and conversations revolve around home and family. Moves, renovation, property paperwork, and talks with relatives are possible. Strength: sorting out domestic affairs and family understanding; the risk, nervous tension at home and household fuss.
mercury.5: Solar-return Mercury in the 5th house: a year when creativity flows through words and ideas. Writing, play, conversation with children, and light romantic talk are in focus. Strength: wit, playfulness, and creative ideas; the risk, superficiality in love and scattered attention.
mercury.6: Solar-return Mercury in the 6th house: a year when work calls for analysis, attention to detail, and clear organization. Health also comes under an analytical eye. Good for optimizing processes. Strength: precision, method, and efficiency; the risk, nitpicking and anxiety over small things.
mercury.7: Solar-return Mercury in the 7th house: a year of negotiation, agreements, and active dialogue with partners. Relationships are built through communication; contracts and business alliances are possible. Strength: mutual understanding and smart agreements; the risk, intellectual sparring and retreating into words instead of feeling.
mercury.8: Solar-return Mercury in the 8th house: a year of deep investigation, hidden information, and serious financial talks. You're drawn to unraveling the complex and the concealed. Strength: penetrating insight and analysis; the risk, obsessive thinking and suspicion.
mercury.9: Solar-return Mercury in the 9th house: a year of broadening your mind through study, travel, and new ideas. Good for higher education, writing, and publishing. Strength: breadth of view and intellectual curiosity; the risk, unfinished projects and scattered attention.
mercury.10: Solar-return Mercury in the 10th house: a year when a career advances through words, ideas, and contacts. Reputation is shaped by what you say and how you say it. Good for negotiation and public speaking. Strength: business communication and intellectual authority; the risk, busyness and superficiality in affairs.
mercury.11: Solar-return Mercury in the 11th house: a year of lively exchange within groups, teams, and communities. Ideas are born in dialogue with like-minded people; your network of contacts expands. Strength: useful connections and collective intelligence; the risk, spreading yourself across too many groups.
mercury.12: Solar-return Mercury in the 12th house: a year when thinking turns inward — journaling, secret plans, working with the unconscious. Much is processed in quiet. Strength: deep analysis and intuitive thought; the risk, withdrawal and anxious, repetitive thinking.

venus.1: Solar-return Venus in the 1st house: a year of charm and magnetism. People like you; you're drawn to beauty and pleasure; appearance and personal style blossom. A good year for love and creativity. Strength: charm, harmony, ease in relationships; the risk, laziness and too much focus on the surface.
venus.2: Solar-return Venus in the 2nd house: a year of growing income, comfort, and enjoyment. Money comes more easily; you're drawn to beautiful things and a quality life. Good for finances tied to art or aesthetics. Strength: financial harmony and an eye for the finer things; the risk, extravagance and self-indulgence.
venus.3: Solar-return Venus in the 3rd house: a year of pleasant conversation, easy new acquaintances, and diplomatic talk. Words win people over; contacts are warm. Good for creative writing and negotiation. Strength: tact and charm in communication; the risk, superficiality and avoiding hard conversations.
venus.4: Solar-return Venus in the 4th house: a year of harmony and comfort at home. You're drawn to beautifying your space, warming up family ties, and creating a pleasant daily life. Strength: coziness, peace at home, family warmth; the risk, idealizing domestic life and resisting change.
venus.5: Solar-return Venus in the 5th house: one of the best years for love, romance, and creativity. You're charming and susceptible to falling in love; art, flirting, and pleasure take priority. Strength: romance, inspiration, joy; the risk, superficiality in feeling and self-indulgence.
venus.6: Solar-return Venus in the 6th house: a year when work becomes more pleasant and harmonious. Relations with colleagues improve; caring for the body through beauty and enjoyment. Strength: a pleasant work atmosphere and attention to the body; the risk, laziness and avoiding what's difficult.
venus.7: Solar-return Venus in the 7th house: one of the best signatures of the year for love and partnership. Relationships blossom; a meaningful meeting or a strengthened bond is possible. Strength: love, accord, and harmonious bonds; the risk, yielding at your own expense.
venus.8: Solar-return Venus in the 8th house: a year of deep, passionate feeling and financial flows through others. Inheritance, shared money, and transforming intimacy are possible. Strength: magnetism, depth, and financial luck through union; the risk, jealousy and possessiveness.
venus.9: Solar-return Venus in the 9th house: a year when the soul is fed by travel, culture, philosophy, and distant connections. Love may come from abroad or across a distance. Strength: openness, spiritual beauty, inspiring bonds; the risk, idealizing the faraway and neglecting what's near.
venus.10: Solar-return Venus in the 10th house: a year when charm and connections work for your career. The public and superiors warm to you; good for work tied to beauty and diplomacy. Strength: a pleasant reputation and useful contacts; the risk, blurring the personal and professional.
venus.11: Solar-return Venus in the 11th house: a year of warm friendship, an agreeable social circle, and lucky new acquaintances. Groups and communities bring joy and connections. Strength: affection, a warm network, group harmony; the risk, superficiality in friendship.
venus.12: Solar-return Venus in the 12th house: a year of secret love, solitary creativity, and inner tenderness. Feelings run deep but stay hidden; you're drawn to beauty in quiet. Strength: spiritual love, inspiration, fine sensitivity; the risk, secret relationships and unspoken feeling.

mars.1: Solar-return Mars in the 1st house: a year of high energy, drive, and initiative. You act first, stand out by your decisiveness, and are ready to fight for what you want. A good year for bold pushes and new starts. Strength: courage, will, breakthrough force; the risk, temper, haste, and conflict.
mars.2: Solar-return Mars in the 2nd house: a year of actively fighting for income and resources. Money is earned through effort and determination; disputes over finances are possible. Strength: energetic earning and financial decisiveness; the risk, impulsive spending and financial conflict.
mars.3: Solar-return Mars in the 3rd house: a year of energetic communication, sharp debate, and constant movement. Many negotiations, trips, and arguments; your words are direct and pointed. Strength: decisiveness in communication; the risk, quarrels with those around you and verbal clashes.
mars.4: Solar-return Mars in the 4th house: a year of activity and possible tension on the home front. Renovation, a move, and settling in — but also family conflict. Strength: energy for the home and protecting loved ones; the risk, quarrels with relatives and domestic stress.
mars.5: Solar-return Mars in the 5th house: a year of passionate love, creative fire, and sporting zeal. Plenty of energy goes into pleasure, flirting, and competition. Strength: passion, a creative flame, and competitive spirit; the risk, impulsiveness in romance and risky ventures.
mars.6: Solar-return Mars in the 6th house: a year of intensive work and active attention to health. You work flat out and can achieve a great deal — but burnout is possible. Strength: productivity and physical energy; the risk, overwork, inflammatory illness, and conflict with colleagues.
mars.7: Solar-return Mars in the 7th house: a year of active, passionate, and sometimes combative relationships. Partnership is charged with energy; open clashes and rivalry are possible. Strength: passion and dynamism in a union; the risk, quarrels and a fight for the upper hand.
mars.8: Solar-return Mars in the 8th house: a year of intense transformation, a fight for resources, and sexual passion. Crises that demand will and endurance are possible. Strength: iron willpower and the capacity to pass through an ordeal; the risk, conflict over shared money and control.
mars.9: Solar-return Mars in the 9th house: a year of active searching for meaning, bold travel, and defending your beliefs. You're drawn to distant journeys and standing up for your truth. Strength: courage and enterprise in new territory; the risk, dogmatism and conflict over views.
mars.10: Solar-return Mars in the 10th house: a year of a career push and a fight for status. Plenty of energy goes into work; initiative is rewarded; conflict with superiors is possible. Strength: drive, achievement, leadership; the risk, harshness and conflict at work.
mars.11: Solar-return Mars in the 11th house: a year of active group work, fighting for shared goals, and energetically expanding your circle. Conflict within a team is possible. Strength: energy in collective endeavors and achieving group goals; the risk, conflict with friends and rivalry.
mars.12: Solar-return Mars in the 12th house: a year of hidden activity — you work behind the scenes, act quietly, and energy turns inward. Hidden conflict or depletion is possible. Strength: persistence in solitude and invisible labor; the risk, energy leaks and concealed adversaries.

jupiter.1: Solar-return Jupiter in the 1st house: one of the best years — growth, luck, and optimism come directly to you. You're on the rise, self-assured, and attracting opportunity. Strength: good fortune, expansion, zest for life; the risk, overconfidence and a taste for excess.
jupiter.2: Solar-return Jupiter in the 2nd house: a lucky year for finances and multiplying resources. Income grows; favorable opportunities arrive; your attitude toward money becomes more generous. Strength: financial growth and abundance; the risk, extravagance and overestimating your earnings.
jupiter.3: Solar-return Jupiter in the 3rd house: a year of an expanding mind, fortunate contacts, and inspiring conversations. Study, travel, and time with interesting people bring growth. Strength: breadth of view and luck in communication; the risk, scattered attention and superficiality.
jupiter.4: Solar-return Jupiter in the 4th house: a year of well-being at home and in the family. Improved housing, a family addition, and growing warmth in private life are all possible. Strength: abundance and support in personal life; the risk, complacency and domestic excess.
jupiter.5: Solar-return Jupiter in the 5th house: a generous year for joy, love, and creativity. Everything that brings pleasure blossoms; romance and hobbies bring luck. Strength: joy, luck in love, a creative upswing; the risk, recklessness, extravagance, and overdoing it.
jupiter.6: Solar-return Jupiter in the 6th house: a year of growth at work and improved health. Labor yields more fruit; conditions get better. Good for acquiring new skills. Strength: productivity, good health, growth in your craft; the risk, overworking out of optimism and weight gain.
jupiter.7: Solar-return Jupiter in the 7th house: a lucky year for relationships, unions, and partnership. Favorable meetings are likely; existing bonds strengthen. Strength: fortunate partnership and support; the risk, idealizing relationships and inflated expectations.
jupiter.8: Solar-return Jupiter in the 8th house: a year of growth through transformation and others' resources. A beneficial inheritance, investments, or deep personal renewal are possible. Strength: luck through crisis and help from others; the risk, recklessness and excessive financial risk.
jupiter.9: Solar-return Jupiter in the 9th house: one of the best years for travel, study, and expanding horizons. Luck in education, foreign affairs, and the search for meaning. Strength: growth, optimism, wisdom; the risk, overconfidence and leaving things unfinished.
jupiter.10: Solar-return Jupiter in the 10th house: a year of career luck, rising status, and professional recognition. Advancement, authority, and new opportunities in your field arrive. Strength: success, reputation, expansion; the risk, arrogance and overrating your position.
jupiter.11: Solar-return Jupiter in the 11th house: a year of luck in friendship, communities, and realizing big goals. Your network expands; like-minded people rally behind you. Strength: luck through groups and inspiring goals; the risk, extravagance in company and unrealistic plans.
jupiter.12: Solar-return Jupiter in the 12th house: a year of quiet but deep growth. Luck comes through solitude, the spiritual, and hidden help. A good year for inner work and preparing for a new cycle. Strength: spiritual growth and quiet good fortune; the risk, escapism and self-deception.

saturn.1: Solar-return Saturn in the 1st house: a serious year of growing up and taking responsibility for yourself. A sense of heaviness or limit is possible, but character is tempered. The year demands discipline and maturity. Strength: self-discipline, maturity, a durable result; the risk, pessimism, isolation, and a feeling of burden.
saturn.2: Solar-return Saturn in the 2nd house: a year of financial caution and working with limited resources. Money demands discipline; difficulties are possible, but so is sensible saving. Strength: carefulness, financial maturity, and long-term support; the risk, miserliness and fear of lack.
saturn.3: Solar-return Saturn in the 3rd house: a year of serious, deliberate communication and in-depth study. Thoughts run heavier; words are more measured; small talk falls away. Strength: depth and responsibility in communication; the risk, withdrawal and anxiety in contact with others.
saturn.4: Solar-return Saturn in the 4th house: a year of responsibility in domestic matters and family. Care for relatives, housing obligations, and bringing order to the foundations are possible; life at home feels weighty. Strength: strengthening foundations for the long haul; the risk, the burden of family duty and a cold home atmosphere.
saturn.5: Solar-return Saturn in the 5th house: a year when pleasure and creativity demand effort. Enjoyment doesn't come easily; love may feel serious and responsibility toward children may weigh heavily. Strength: mature creativity and responsible love; the risk, a block on self-expression and a joyless feeling.
saturn.6: Solar-return Saturn in the 6th house: a year of intense labor and disciplined attention to health. Work demands a great deal; the body also calls for a responsible approach. A good year for building healthy habits. Strength: productivity, discipline, real results; the risk, overwork and chronic strain.
saturn.7: Solar-return Saturn in the 7th house: a year of serious relationships tested for durability. The union demands work and responsibility; commitment, marriage, or, conversely, cooling and parting are possible. Strength: maturity and solidity in bonds; the risk, coldness, distance, and heaviness in the pair.
saturn.8: Solar-return Saturn in the 8th house: a year when transformation and shared finances demand discipline. Inheritance, debts, and taxes are all under strict control. Strength: responsibility in complex matters and resilience; the risk, fear of loss and hard constraints.
saturn.9: Solar-return Saturn in the 9th house: a year of serious, in-depth study and a testing of beliefs. Travel may be restricted; but knowledge is absorbed thoroughly. Strength: mature wisdom and discipline in learning; the risk, narrow-mindedness and excessive skepticism.
saturn.10: Solar-return Saturn in the 10th house: a year of hard work aimed at long-term success. Career demands patience and discipline; what you build is solid. Tests of status are possible. Strength: reliable, earned success; the risk, overload, pressure, and fear of failure.
saturn.11: Solar-return Saturn in the 11th house: a year of re-evaluating friendships and group ties. Your social circle narrows to what is genuine and tested. Strength: mature, reliable bonds and responsible goals; the risk, loneliness and disillusionment with people.
saturn.12: Solar-return Saturn in the 12th house: a year of deep inner work with limitations, fears, and the past. Much recedes inward; honest reckoning with what holds you back is important. Strength: spiritual maturity and release from old blocks; the risk, depression, isolation, and a feeling of being trapped.

uranus.1: Solar-return Uranus in the 1st house: a year of sharp change in your self-image and the shape of your life. You want freedom; everything new pulls you; the familiar routine can break unexpectedly. Strength: renewal, originality, breakthrough; the risk, instability and impulsive decisions.
uranus.2: Solar-return Uranus in the 2nd house: a year of unpredictable finances. Income may jump sharply up or drop suddenly; unexpected sources of money or unexpected losses arrive. Strength: unconventional ways of earning; the risk, financial instability and impulse spending.
uranus.3: Solar-return Uranus in the 3rd house: a year of unexpected ideas, unconventional communication, and sudden trips. The mind moves in leaps; flashes of insight arrive. Strength: original ideas and unusual connections; the risk, nervousness and inconsistency.
uranus.4: Solar-return Uranus in the 4th house: a year of change at home and in the family. A move, a reshaping of domestic life, and unexpected events involving loved ones are possible. You're drawn to a new way of living. Strength: renewal of your life and freedom in the private sphere; the risk, instability at home and abrupt family shifts.
uranus.5: Solar-return Uranus in the 5th house: a year of sudden love, unconventional creativity, and unexpected new passions. Life crackles with electricity; boredom is off the table. Strength: vividness, originality, excitement; the risk, instability in feeling and inconstancy.
uranus.6: Solar-return Uranus in the 6th house: a year of change at work and in your daily rhythm. A job change, an unconventional schedule, or unexpected health events are possible. Strength: flexibility and innovation in your work; the risk, chaos in routine and an overstrained nervous system.
uranus.7: Solar-return Uranus in the 7th house: a year of change in relationships. Sudden meetings, unconventional unions, or abrupt breakups are possible; partnership grows freer. Strength: renewal and freshness in bonds; the risk, instability and sudden splits.
uranus.8: Solar-return Uranus in the 8th house: a year of unexpected transformation and sharp shifts in shared finances. A sudden inheritance or an unforeseen crisis is possible. Strength: a breakthrough through an unconventional crisis; the risk, chaotic change and shock events.
uranus.9: Solar-return Uranus in the 9th house: a year of surprise travel, unconventional knowledge, and a sudden shift in worldview. Your horizons change unexpectedly. Strength: a fresh perspective and a breakthrough in how you see the world; the risk, scattered attention and unfinished starts.
uranus.10: Solar-return Uranus in the 10th house: a year of sharp change in career and status. A job change, an unexpected turning point, or an unconventional path are possible. Strength: a breakthrough and innovation in your work; the risk, instability and sudden disruptions to your status.
uranus.11: Solar-return Uranus in the 11th house: a year of vivid, unconventional friendships and unexpected shifts in your social circle. You're drawn to free-spirited, progressive people. Strength: original connections and fresh ideas; the risk, inconstancy in friendship.
uranus.12: Solar-return Uranus in the 12th house: a year of unexpected inner breakthroughs and hidden upheavals. Change happens quietly but alters a great deal. Strength: sudden release from the old; the risk, inner chaos and unpredictable disruptions.

neptune.1: Solar-return Neptune in the 1st house: a year of heightened sensitivity, dreaminess, and spiritual openness. The boundaries of self soften; you're drawn to creativity and solitude. Strength: inspiration, empathy, fine intuition; the risk, fog, fatigue, and lost clarity.
neptune.2: Solar-return Neptune in the 2nd house: a year of financial uncertainty. Money seeps away quietly; it's hard to get a clear picture of resources. A good year for earning through creativity. Strength: an intuitive approach to money; the risk, financial fog, illusions, and losses.
neptune.3: Solar-return Neptune in the 3rd house: a year of imaginative, intuitive thinking and poetic communication. Facts blur; imagination and sensitivity are heightened. Strength: creative thought and subtle understanding; the risk, confusion and misunderstanding in communication.
neptune.4: Solar-return Neptune in the 4th house: a year of a subtle, dreamy home atmosphere and a pull toward solitude. Family boundaries soften; housing matters may be unclear. Strength: peace of mind and spiritual grounding in private life; the risk, fog in family affairs and escapism.
neptune.5: Solar-return Neptune in the 5th house: a year of elevated love, spiritual creativity, and idealized romance. Art, dreams, and sensitivity take center stage. Strength: inspiration, subtlety, spiritual beauty; the risk, illusions in love and unrealized creative work.
neptune.6: Solar-return Neptune in the 6th house: a year of sensitive but unstable health and uncertainty at work. Wellbeing responds to everything; conserving energy matters. Strength: attunement to the body and intuition in work; the risk, psychosomatic complaints, fog in your affairs, and energy leaks.
neptune.7: Solar-return Neptune in the 7th house: a year of romantic but blurred relationships. A partner seems ideal or elusive; boundaries in the pair are unclear. Strength: spiritual closeness and compassion; the risk, illusions, deception, and self-sacrifice.
neptune.8: Solar-return Neptune in the 8th house: a year of dissolving into the deep, the hidden, and the mystical. Shared finances are foggy; a spiritual breakthrough is possible. Strength: spiritual transformation and fine intuition; the risk, deception over shared money and escapism.
neptune.9: Solar-return Neptune in the 9th house: a year of spiritual seeking, mystical travel, and idealistic beliefs. You're drawn to meditation, philosophy, and the sacred. Strength: spiritual wisdom and inspiration; the risk, detachment from reality and religious fanaticism.
neptune.10: Solar-return Neptune in the 10th house: a year of uncertainty in career and reputation. Goals are blurred; a creative or spiritual path in your profession is possible. Strength: an inspired calling and a creative reputation; the risk, a foggy career direction and disappointments.
neptune.11: Solar-return Neptune in the 11th house: a year of idealized friendship and diffuse group goals. You're drawn to spiritual communities; boundaries within the group are unclear. Strength: compassion and spiritual bonds; the risk, illusions about friends and shapeless aims.
neptune.12: Solar-return Neptune in the 12th house: a year of deep spiritual immersion, vivid dreamlife, and mysticism. The inner world is rich; the line between reality and imagination grows thin. Strength: spiritual depth, intuition, creative inspiration; the risk, escapism and losing yourself in illusions.

pluto.1: Solar-return Pluto in the 1st house: a year of deep personal transformation. You and your life pass through powerful change; inner strength and personal magnetism grow. Strength: rebirth, willpower, magnetism; the risk, crises, control struggles, and obsessiveness.
pluto.2: Solar-return Pluto in the 2nd house: a year of radical reshaping of your relationship with money and resources. Finances may shift dramatically — surge or collapse; the theme of power through money comes into focus. Strength: deep renewal of resources; the risk, an obsession with money and financial power games.
pluto.3: Solar-return Pluto in the 3rd house: a year of deep, penetrating thought and transforming conversations. Your words carry weight; secrets and shifts in your immediate circle are possible. Strength: insight and the power to change minds; the risk, obsessive thinking and verbal manipulation.
pluto.4: Solar-return Pluto in the 4th house: a year of deep change at home, in the family, and in your roots. Crises and transformation in private life are possible; what was hidden surfaces. Strength: deep renewal of your foundations and inner strength; the risk, heavy family crises.
pluto.5: Solar-return Pluto in the 5th house: a year of passionate, all-consuming love and intense creativity. Feeling runs deep; obsession or transformation through a romance is possible. Strength: depth, passion, and creative rebirth; the risk, obsessiveness and destructive jealousy.
pluto.6: Solar-return Pluto in the 6th house: a year of deep change in work and health. A work crisis or a life-reshaping illness are possible. Strength: the capacity for a radical lifestyle overhaul; the risk, crises in your work and an obsessive attitude toward health.
pluto.7: Solar-return Pluto in the 7th house: a year of intense, transforming relationships. Partnership moves through depth, passion, or a power struggle; bonds are powerful and anything but indifferent. Strength: deep intimacy and transformation through another; the risk, control, jealousy, and power games.
pluto.8: Solar-return Pluto in the 8th house: a year of maximum depth and transformation. Crises, inheritance, shared resources, and questions of life and death come into focus. Strength: rebirth, willpower, regeneration; the risk, obsession, power struggle, and dark themes.
pluto.9: Solar-return Pluto in the 9th house: a year of transformation in your worldview and beliefs. Your perspective on life shifts radically; a crisis of faith or a deep awakening is possible. Strength: powerful wisdom and a transformed outlook; the risk, fanaticism and imposing your views on others.
pluto.10: Solar-return Pluto in the 10th house: a year of powerful change in career and power. A radical overhaul of your path, a fight for influence, or a rise through crisis are possible. Strength: scale and the power to rebuild your path; the risk, power struggles and a work crisis.
pluto.11: Solar-return Pluto in the 11th house: a year of transformation in your social circle and group goals. Old ties may fall away; powerful, influential people enter. Strength: deep, significant bonds and transforming goals; the risk, manipulation within groups and power games.
pluto.12: Solar-return Pluto in the 12th house: a year of the deepest inner work and transformation of the unconscious. Hidden fears and shadow material surface to be worked through. Strength: deep rebirth from within; the risk, dark periods, obsessiveness, and isolation.
